title: Fastly Optimized
description: A modpack that focused on performance.
body:
# Fastly Optimized

## What is this modpack about?
> This modpack focuses on improving performance.

## What mods does this modpack include?
> It includes many optimization and performance-enhancing mods, along with a few extra ones like Zoomify.

## Which versions does this modpack support?
> It supports versions from 1.21.9 to the latest one. Backport isn't planned.
